name: Bitcoin IOU — Tranche A
tagline: Bitcoin-backed IOU instrument — Deal Series A — issued via Troptions Gateway.
description: BTCA is a Bitcoin-backed IOU issued by the Troptions Gateway on the XRP Ledger and Stellar mainnet. Each unit represents a redeemable claim on Bitcoin value under the terms of the Troptions $100M Deal Series A agreement. Issuance, transfer, and redemption are governed by the Troptions compliance framework and applicable deal documentation.
longDescription: BTCA is Tranche A of the Troptions Bitcoin IOU series, structured to support the $100M Bitcoin acquisition and settlement deal. The issuer (Troptions Gateway, operating from the registered XRPL and Stellar issuer accounts) maintains Bitcoin reserves in a segregated multi-sig custody arrangement. Holders may present BTCA IOUs for redemption against Bitcoin or USD-equivalent value subject to KYC verification and deal terms. The instrument is issued on both XRPL (hex currency code 4254434100000000000000000000000000000000) and Stellar (asset code BTCA) from the same governance-controlled issuer addresses.

compliance.redemptionTerms: Redemption requires KYC verification and execution of deal Series A redemption form. Bitcoin or USD-equivalent disbursed within 5 business days.
compliance.custodyArrangement: Multi-sig Bitcoin custody, segregated from operating accounts.
